import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import '../styles/Landing.css'; const STARS = Array.from({ length: 60 }, (_, i) => ({ id: i, top: Math.random() * 100, left: Math.random() * 100, size: Math.random() * 2 + 0.5, duration: Math.random() * 3 + 2, delay: Math.random() * 4, })); const HEATMAP = Array.from({ length: 56 }, () => { const r = Math.random(); return r > 0.6 ? `rgba(34,197,94,${(r).toFixed(2)})` : r > 0.3 ? 'rgba(34,197,94,0.2)' : '#222'; }); function Landing() { const [owlBlink, setOwlBlink] = useState(false); const [scrolled, setScrolled] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { const blink = setInterval(() => { setOwlBlink(true); setTimeout(() => setOwlBlink(false), 180); }, 3200); const onScroll = () => setScrolled(window.scrollY > 20); window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll); return () => { clearInterval(blink); window.removeEventListener('scroll', onScroll); }; }, []); return (
